scripts.format:affected: nx format:write --base=origin/main --head=HEAD --sort-root-tsconfig-paths=false && git diff -z --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR origin/main...HEAD | xargs -0 -r prettier --ignore-unknown --write
scripts.format:affected:check: nx format:check --base=${NX_BASE:-origin/main} --head=${NX_HEAD:-HEAD} --sort-root-tsconfig-paths=false && git diff -z --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR ${NX_BASE:-origin/main}...${NX_HEAD:-HEAD} | xargs -0 -r prettier --ignore-unknown --check
scripts.format:affected:local: nx format:write --uncommitted --sort-root-tsconfig-paths=false && git diff -z --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR | xargs -0 -r prettier --ignore-unknown --write
scripts.format:affected:check:local: nx format:check --uncommitted --sort-root-tsconfig-paths=false && git diff -z --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR | xargs -0 -r prettier --ignore-unknown --check
scripts.check:affected: npm run lint:affected && npm run typecheck:affected && npm run format:affected:check
scripts.check:affected:local: npm run lint:affected:local && npm run typecheck:affected:local && npm run format:affected:check:local
scripts.check:all: npm run lint:all && npm run typecheck:all
